desc.en: Full transit map of Paris, covering Metro lines 1-14，all RER A/B/C/D/E, tram lines T1-T12 and Transilien suburban rail. All station names and line colors follow the official RATP standard.Apart from Tram T13, Tram T14 and Transilien Line V, since their routes lie far outside the map’s drawing boundary.

updateHistory.reason: This map includes all Metro, RER, Tram and Transilien lines in Paris. Apart from Tram T13, Tram T14 and Transilien Line V, since their routes lie far outside the map drawing boundary.
